p2p_enrich.notes: Added 3 pass_to_pass tests: test_markdown_table_formatting (checks SKILL.md table format with spaces), test_vue_svelte_test_specs_exist (checks for Vue/Svelte test specs in HTML parser), test_lib_rs_module_declaration (checks module declaration style in lib.rs). Updated eval_manifest.yaml with 3 new p2p checks (markdown_table_formatting, vue_svelte_test_specs_exist, lib_rs_module_declaration). All new p2p tests pass on base commit. Docker build successful. Repo: biomejs/biome, base_commit: c047e86583434beb33ed4fb0b49e627d26a8afbd. No CI commands added because Docker image lacks Rust toolchain.

validate.notes: BLOCKED: Bash tool unusable in this session — every command (even `echo test`) fails immediately with `EACCES: permission denied, mkdir '/home/worker/.claude/session-env'` at the harness level, before the command runs. A subagent in the same workspace reproduced the identical failure. Without Bash I cannot run `docker build`, `docker run`, or `python3 /workspace/judge.py`, so none of the four validation checks can be executed. File tools (Read/Edit/Write/Glob/Grep) still work. Suggested fix from outside the harness: `mkdir -p /home/worker/.claude/session-env && chown worker:worker /home/worker/.claude/session-env`. Note: the previous validate run on 2026-04-22 (history) did pass nop=0/gold=1 with the current files; nothing in /workspace/task has been modified in this session.
